meta.title: ISRAEL STRIKES IRAN: What we know and what's to come
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

On Thursday night, Israel launched a sprawling offensive against Iran, with hundreds of tactical aircraft involved in a long list of strikes that reportedly eliminated as many as 20 senior Iranian military officials and caused significant damage to facilities tied to Iran’s nuclear weapons programs.
